conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Did you finish the quarterly report?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Almost. I just need the sales figures from Tom.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: He said he'd send them by 3 PM today.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Great. I'll finalize the report right after that.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Do you need any help with the formatting?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: No thanks. I have the template ready from last quarter.

questions.question: What are the speakers mainly discussing?
questions.explanation: 對話從頭到尾都在討論季度報告的進度、所需資料與完成時間。

questions.question: What does the woman need from Tom?
questions.explanation: B說她還需要Tom的銷售數據才能完成報告。

questions.question: When will the report most likely be completed?
options: By the end of the week
questions.explanation: Tom預計3點前發送數據，B說收到後立刻完成報告，因此報告應在下午3點後完成。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: We're running low on printer paper. Can you place an order?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Sure. How many reams do we need?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Get five reams of A4 and two of A3.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: The regular supplier is offering a fifteen percent discount on bulk orders this week.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Then let's order ten reams of A4 instead. It'll last us longer.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Good idea. I'll also add toner cartridges to the list.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Yes, please add two black cartridges. Thanks.

questions.question: What are the speakers doing?
questions.explanation: 對話內容為訂購影印紙與碳粉匣等辦公用品。

questions.question: How many reams of A4 paper do they decide to order?
questions.explanation: A原本要訂五令，聽到有折扣後決定改訂十令。

questions.question: What else does the man ask to add to the order?
questions.explanation: A最後說要加訂兩個黑色碳粉匣。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: The client just called. They can't make tomorrow's two o'clock meeting.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Oh no. Should we reschedule for Friday?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Friday is fully booked for me. How about Thursday at two?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Let me check the conference room schedule... Yes, Room B is free at that time.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Perfect. I'll email the client right away with the new time.

questions.question: Why is the meeting being rescheduled?
questions.explanation: A明確說客戶來電表示無法參加明天的會議。

questions.question: When was the meeting originally scheduled?
questions.explanation: A說客戶無法參加明天下午兩點的會議。

questions.question: What will the woman do next?
questions.explanation: A說要立刻發郵件通知客戶新的會議時間。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: The new marketing assistant starts next Monday.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: That's great. Who's handling their orientation?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: HR will do the morning session on company policies.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: And what about training on our marketing software?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Lisa will handle that in the afternoon. She's the most experienced on the team.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Has IT set up their workstation yet?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Yes, they're installing the computer and phone today.

questions.question: When does the new employee start?
questions.explanation: A明確說新行銷助理下週一開始上班。

questions.question: Who will provide software training?
questions.explanation: A說Lisa會在下午負責行銷軟體的培訓。

questions.question: What is the IT department doing today?
questions.explanation: A說IT今天正在安裝新人的電腦和電話。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: I need to present the quarterly sales numbers. When should I go in?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: You're the second item on the agenda.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: So right after the opening remarks?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Exactly. Your slot starts at nine thirty.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: And how long do I have?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: You have forty-five minutes, until ten fifteen.

questions.question: What topic will the woman present?
questions.explanation: 對話中B說A是議程第二項，對照chartData第二列為Sales Performance Review，由Ms. Lin主講，主題為銷售業績檢討。

questions.question: How long is the woman's presentation slot?
Who will present the Budget Planning session?
questions.explanation: 對話中提到預算議題在銷售檢討之後，對照chartData可知Budget Planning由Mr. Wang主講。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: A client from Singapore is visiting our office this Friday.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Should I book a conference room and arrange lunch?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Yes, please reserve the main boardroom from ten to noon.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: What about lunch? Do they have any dietary restrictions?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: They mentioned they prefer vegetarian options. Let's book that Italian place nearby.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: I'll call the restaurant and make a reservation for two people at twelve thirty.

questions.question: Where is the client visiting from?
questions.explanation: A說來自新加坡的客戶週五要來訪。

questions.question: What is the woman asked to do first?
questions.explanation: A請B預訂主會議室，時間為上午10點到中午。

questions.question: Why did they choose the Italian restaurant?
questions.explanation: 客戶偏好素食選項，因此A建議訂附近的義大利餐廳。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: I'm going to grab lunch. Do you want me to bring you something?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: That would be great. What's on the menu today?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: The cafeteria has chicken teriyaki, pasta salad, and beef noodles.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: I'll have the chicken teriyaki, please.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: With rice or bread?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Rice, please. And could you get me a bottle of water too?

questions.question: Where are the speakers most likely?
questions.explanation: A說要去買午餐並問B要不要帶一份回來，符合辦公室同事之間的對話情境。

questions.question: What does the man order?
questions.explanation: B選擇了照燒雞肉。

questions.question: What drink does the man request?
questions.explanation: B最後請A順便帶一瓶水。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: I need to submit my travel expenses from last week's business trip.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Sure. Do you have all the receipts?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Yes, I have receipts for the hotel, taxi fares, and two client dinners.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Fill out this expense form and attach the receipts. The deadline is Friday.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: How long does it usually take to get reimbursed?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: About two weeks after you submit the form.

questions.question: What is the man trying to do?
questions.explanation: A想報銷上週出差費用，B請他填寫報銷單。

questions.question: What is NOT mentioned as a reimbursable expense?
questions.explanation: A列舉的單據包括飯店、計程車和客戶晚餐，未提及機票。

questions.question: How long does reimbursement take?
questions.explanation: B說提交報銷單後大約兩週可以收到款項。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: I'm looking for a new office chair. Which one do you recommend?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: We have three models in stock. What's your budget?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Around three hundred dollars. I need good back support.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: The ergonomic model is our most popular. It has adjustable lumbar support and armrests.

questions.question: Which model fits within the man's budget?
questions.explanation: A預算約300美元，對照chartData：Standard($120)和Ergonomic($280)都在預算內，Executive($450)超出預算。

questions.question: What feature is the man most concerned about?
questions.explanation: A明確說需要良好的背部支撐。

questions.question: What is the price of the Executive model?
questions.explanation: A的預算是300美元，B推薦人體工學款。對照chartData：Executive款為$450，超出預算；Standard($120)和Ergonomic($280)在預算內。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: The server has been really slow all morning. Can you take a look?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: I'll check the system right now. When did it start?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Around nine o'clock. I've already tried restarting my computer.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: It might be a network issue. Let me run a diagnostic test.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Should I tell the team to save their work just in case?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Yes, that's a good idea. I'll update you in about ten minutes.

questions.question: What problem is the woman reporting?
questions.explanation: A說伺服器整個早上都很慢。

questions.question: What has the woman already tried?
questions.explanation: A說已經試過重開機。

questions.question: What does B suggest the woman do?
options: Tell the team to save work
questions.answer: Tell the team to save work
questions.explanation: B同意A的提議，建議大家先存檔以防萬一。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Have you finished the design drafts for the new brochure?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Not yet. I'm waiting for the product photos from the marketing team.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: They were supposed to send those yesterday.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: I emailed them this morning. They said they'll have them ready by noon.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Can you still meet the Friday deadline?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: It'll be tight, but I think I can manage if I get the photos soon.

questions.question: What is the man waiting for?
questions.explanation: B說他在等行銷團隊提供產品照片。

questions.question: When were the photos originally expected?
questions.explanation: A說照片本來應該昨天就發過來。

questions.question: What is the final deadline for the brochure?
questions.explanation: A問能否趕上週五的截止日，B說如果盡快收到照片應該可以。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: We need to ship this package to the Tokyo office by express delivery.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: What's inside the package?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Just documents. The contract needs to arrive before Thursday.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Express delivery takes two business days, so it should arrive on Wednesday.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Perfect. Please use the company account for shipping.

questions.question: Where is the package being sent?
questions.explanation: A說需要快遞包裹到東京辦公室。

questions.question: What is inside the package?
questions.explanation: A說裡面只有文件，是合約。

questions.question: When does the contract need to arrive?
questions.explanation: A要求合約必須在週四前到達東京。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: I'd like to schedule my annual performance review with Mr. Tanaka.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: His calendar is quite full this week. Would next Tuesday work?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Tuesday morning is fine. Does he prefer video call or in-person?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: He prefers in-person meetings for performance reviews.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: Then let's book his office at ten o'clock.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: I've put you in for Tuesday at ten. You'll need to bring your self-evaluation form.

questions.question: What does the woman want to schedule?
questions.explanation: A說想安排年度績效考核會議。

questions.question: When is the meeting scheduled?
questions.explanation: B建議下週二，A同意早上，最終訂在10點。

questions.question: What does the woman need to bring?
questions.explanation: B提醒A需要帶自我評估表。

questions.question: How does Mr. Tanaka prefer to hold performance reviews?
questions.explanation: B說Tanaka先生偏好面對面進行績效考核。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: I'm tracking a delivery. Can you check the status for me?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Of course. What's the tracking number?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: It's TN seven eight four two. It was supposed to arrive yesterday.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Let me look it up. It shows your package is currently at the local distribution center.

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: When will it be delivered then?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: It's scheduled for delivery tomorrow between nine AM and noon.

questions.question: What is the status of the woman's package?
questions.explanation: 對話中B說包裹目前在當地配送中心，對照chartData中TN7842的Current Status為At Local Distribution Center。

questions.question: When was the package originally supposed to arrive?
questions.explanation: A說包裹本該昨天就到。

questions.question: What tracking number is currently out for delivery?
questions.explanation: A追蹤的編號是TN7842，對照chartData第三列TN7843的狀態為Out for Delivery。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: The fire alarm test is scheduled for this afternoon at two.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: How long will it last?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: About ten minutes. The alarm will sound three times.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: Do we need to evacuate the building?

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.line: No, it's just a test. But please inform your team so they don't panic.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.line: I'll send a quick message to everyone on our floor right now.

questions.question: What is scheduled for this afternoon?
questions.explanation: A說下午兩點安排了火災警報測試。

questions.question: Do employees need to leave the building?
options: No, it is just a test
questions.answer: No, it is just a test
questions.explanation: A明確說不需要疏散，只是測試。

questions.question: What will the man do next?
questions.explanation: B說會立刻傳訊息通知樓層同事。
